coverage.name: Coverage of perspectives
coverage.comparison_text: Coverage: four-llms-bitcoin-claude 1/5 vs four-llms-bitcoin-gemini 4/5. only four-llms-bitcoin-claude addresses causes. only four-llms-bitcoin-gemini addresses risks, stakeholders, trends, uncertainty. only four-llms-bitcoin-claude fires FVS-001 Frame Amplification, FVS-008 Growth Frame.

calibration.name: Claim calibration
calibration.comparison_text: Hedge ratio: four-llms-bitcoin-claude 0.00 (4 claims) vs four-llms-bitcoin-gemini 0.12 (8 claims). only four-llms-bitcoin-gemini fires FVS-012 Uncertainty Frame.

robustness.name: Robustness
robustness.comparison_text: Neither peer had claims checked against external sources.

counterfactual.name: Counterfactual thinking
counterfactual.comparison_text: Only four-llms-bitcoin-gemini engages with counterfactual thinking; four-llms-bitcoin-claude does not. only four-llms-bitcoin-claude fires FVS-001 Frame Amplification, FVS-007 Failure Framing; only four-llms-bitcoin-gemini fires FVS-012 Uncertainty Frame.

narrative:
Where four-llms-bitcoin-claude and four-llms-bitcoin-gemini differ structurally:
  - Coverage of perspectives: Coverage: four-llms-bitcoin-claude 1/5 vs four-llms-bitcoin-gemini 4/5. only four-llms-bitcoin-claude addresses causes. only four-llms-bitcoin-gemini addresses risks, stakeholders, trends, uncertainty. only four-llms-bitcoin-claude fires FVS-001 Frame Amplification, FVS-008 Growth Frame.
  - Claim calibration: Hedge ratio: four-llms-bitcoin-claude 0.00 (4 claims) vs four-llms-bitcoin-gemini 0.12 (8 claims). only four-llms-bitcoin-gemini fires FVS-012 Uncertainty Frame.
  - Counterfactual thinking: Only four-llms-bitcoin-gemini engages with counterfactual thinking; four-llms-bitcoin-claude does not. only four-llms-bitcoin-claude fires FVS-001 Frame Amplification, FVS-007 Failure Framing; only four-llms-bitcoin-gemini fires FVS-012 Uncertainty Frame.
